items.name_en: Latest brick store butterfly bow chain WOC
items.name_cn:
Latest brick store butterfly bow chain WOC
Iconic rattan pattern, classic letter charm
Distinctive bow design paired with soft sheepskin
Elegant and stylish, the highlight is the exquisite bow chain
Making the whole bag more refined, with multiple interior pockets and card slots. Beautiful yet highly practical
size: 21*11.5*7cm
5840

items.name_en: Lunch Box Bag in Stock!!️
items.name_cn:
Lunch Box Bag in Stock!!️
Hobostar Denim Series. I was inspired to get this bag; it reinterprets the classic letter pattern with irregular stonewash effects, giving the bag a fresh style. The gradient effect is unique and cool, and the denim print shows off a fashionable charm that looks both premium and visually striking. The extra-large capacity design fully meets daily travel needs, it is stylish, versatile, and full of vintage vibes.
Size: 28.5*10*14.5cm

items.name_en: Medium
items.name_cn:
Medium
👄Dior New Toujours Handbag, this Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the 2023 Spring/Summer show. Its casual and practical design is unique, crafted from imported calfskin and finished with oversized woven quilting. The spacious interior compartment with a small pocket allows for neat storage of daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D rotary clasp, adjustable sides to enhance style, and a leather handle with adjustable details for easy carrying! CD Lock and strap closure with Dior charm, detachable inner pocket, adjustable leather handle, includes dust bag! Model: M1188m, Size: 28.5x19x21.5cm.

items.name_en: Medium
items.name_cn:
Medium
Tote latest Autumn/Winter Paris Map Series, I've been wanting this tote, it's here. It retains the simple bag shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. Can be carried by hand or crossbody, fully meeting daily travel needs. Classic animal embroidery, iconic letters, stylish and versatile with a full vintage vibe
size:36*16*27cm

items.name_en: Medium in stock!!️
items.name_cn:
Medium in stock!!️
Take Toujours on your travels. The oversized tricot design, paired with classic lettering, offers a modern and stylish look. The bag structure is soft, and the calfskin material feels premium. The unique buckle fastening allows the sides to fold when closed. The capacity is very nice, and it comes with a thoughtful internal pocket for storing small items.
size: 28.5*19*21cm
Model: 5888
